overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city underpass at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets with futuristic traffic, and passes digital billboards in a dense urban environment.

events.description: character begins walking forward from standing position at the crosswalk
futuristic black sedan passes by on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: character starts walking along the sidewalk under the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past the character on the street

entered.detail: massive concrete structure covering the entire street area
bright yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
long horizontal neon light fixture mounted on tall pole
regulatory sign displaying speed limit of 40

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a character standing at a crosswalk under a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city. As the character begins walking, futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road. The environment is illuminated by artificial neon lights, with yellow crosswalk markings visible on the wet asphalt surface.

events.description: character passes behind a large concrete support pillar briefly

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking in the opposite direction toward the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete column supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the covered sidewalk, passing large concrete support pillars that hold up the overpass. The speed limit sign recedes into the distance while the neon street lights draw closer. A distant pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: large glowing digital billboards become prominent on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking past yellow utility structures and illuminated digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on the wall
row of bright yellow utility lockers and electrical boxes

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the right side of the frame becomes dominated by large digital billboards and yellow utility structures. The environment maintains its cyberpunk aesthetic with neon lighting reflecting off the wet pavement. Another pedestrian is visible ahead, walking in the same direction.

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
futuristic armored SUV waits at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic armored SUV stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians
pedestrian crossing the street alongside the character

entered.detail: illuminated walk sign mounted on pole at the intersection
yellow zebra stripes and road markings at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters a crosswalk at a busy intersection, joining other pedestrians in crossing the street. A futuristic armored vehicle waits at the crosswalk. The scene shows moderate traffic density with multiple futuristic cars visible, while the concrete overpass continues overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban underpass that transitions from a quiet roadside walk into a bustling city intersection. It begins at a crosswalk beneath a massive concrete overpass, where futuristic vehicles glide past on wet asphalt illuminated by artificial lights. As the character moves forward, the camera passes heavy concrete support pillars and receding street signs, drawing closer to the vibrant glow of neon street lamps. The scene then shifts as large digital billboards and yellow utility structures begin to dominate the right side of the frame, with reflections of the cyberpunk skyline shimmering on the pavement. Finally, the path opens into a busy intersection where the character joins a crowd of pedestrians to cross the street beside a waiting armored vehicle.
